name: Delete Comment
description: Author-only, scoped to the comment id + JWT subject in a single DELETE (no separate slug/article-ownership check — RealWorld's spec does not tie comment deletion to the article's author, only the comment's). `rows_affected == 0` conflates two distinct causes (comment id doesn't exist vs. exists but belongs to someone else) into a single 403; documented as a MINOR finding since a 404-vs-403 split would need an extra find-then-check round trip for a rarely-exercised edge case.

config.query: DELETE FROM comments WHERE id = $1 AND author_id = $2
